context: Expenses reimbursable from tutoring and freelance IT income. All purchases must relate directly to tutoring, IT help desk work, or app development for Lakeview University clients.

validation_rules.requirement: Expense must fall under: Textbooks, Software Subscriptions, Office Supplies, Transportation to sessions
Books unrelated to CS coursework or tutoring
validation_rules.notes: Only CS textbooks used for tutoring sessions qualify
Only one valid receipt per purchase allowed

validation_rules.requirement: Submissions after 60 days of purchase date
validation_rules.notes: Submit within 60 days of purchase for reimbursement consideration

validation_rules.requirement: CTA Ventra reloads and transit passes for tutoring commute
validation_rules.notes: Must correspond to a confirmed tutoring session date
